lsu.config.title: Lifesteal Utils
lsu.config.customization.messages.pmform: Whether to enable custom private message formatting
Customize the format of private messages (/msg, /r)
lsu.config.customization.messages.disabl: Disables chat tags, such as [No-Life], from appearing in messages for visual simplicity.
lsu.config.customization.messages.ghoste: Whether to enable ghosted chat messages for matched patterns.
lsu.config.customization.ghostedchatpatt: Text patterns that will ghost matching chat messages (case-insensitive contains).
lsu.config.customization.titlescreen.cus: Whether to enable custom splashes on the title screen
lsu.config.customization.resourcepack.re: Whether to remove server-provided emoji model/font mappings
Whether to remove all server-provided shield item overrides
Whether to remove all server-provided sword item overrides
Whether to remove all server-provided axe item overrides
Whether to remove all server-provided pickaxe item overrides
Whether to remove all server-provided shovel item overrides
Whether to remove all server-provided mace item overrides
Whether to remove all server-provided bow item overrides
Whether to remove all server-provided crossbow item overrides
lsu.config.qol.titlescreen.quickjoinbutt: Quick Join button on the title screen
lsu.config.qol.titlescreen.custompanoram: Custom panorama background on the title screen
lsu.config.qol.scaling.rareitemscaleenab: Enable increased scale for rare items such as neth and custom enchants.
lsu.config.qol.pois.poidirectionalindica: Show directional arrow indicator pointing toward tracked POI
How the POI HUD indicator is shown (text, compass, both, or none)
lsu.config.qol.pois.alwaysshowclosest.de: Unless you've configured to track a specific POI, show the closest one
lsu.config.qol.pois.poiwaypointformat.de: Custom format for the POI waypoint display
lsu.config.qol.xaero.poiwaypointsenabled: Show Lifesteal Utils POIs as Xaero's Minimap waypoints
lsu.config.qol.autojoin.autojoinlifestea: Automatically join the Lifesteal gamemode when connecting to the lifesteal.net hub
lsu.config.qol.customuis.custombaltopint: Replaces /baltop with the Lifesteal Utils interface. Disable to use the server GUI or macro-based automation.
lsu.config.timers.chaincounter.enabled.d: Whether to enable the unbroken chain counter HUD element
lsu.config.timers.chaincounter.format.de: Custom format for the unbroken chain counter display
lsu.config.timers.heavenly.enabled.desc: Whether to enable the heavenly durability calculator HUD element
lsu.config.timers.heavenly.format.desc: Custom format for the heavenly durability calculator display
Show heavenly durability result as a numeric value or percentage
lsu.config.timers.customenchanttimers.au: Automatically hide custom timers if you don't have the custom in your inventory
lsu.config.alliances.general.enableallia: Whether to enable alliance features such as colored name tags.
lsu.config.alliances.general.alliancepre: Whether to render alliance prefixes in nametags
lsu.config.alliances.general.alliancenam: Whether to apply list-specific alliance name colors to player names
lsu.config.alliances.general.allowallian: Allow Alliance Members to Bypass Ghosted Chat Filter
If enabled, messages from alliance members are not ghosted even when patterns match.
lsu.config.alliances.allianceprefixprior: Alliance priority list for choosing which prefix and color to display
lsu.config.meow.messages.pmformat.desc: Customize the format of private messages (/msg, /r)
lsu.config.minimessage.title: MiniMessage Editor
key.lifesteal-utils.add_alliance_target: Toggle Looked-at Player in Selected Alliance
lsu.alliances.select.none: <red>We're not sure which alliance you want to add this player to! Please select an alliance first with /lsu alliances select <alliance name>.</red>
lsu.alliances.select.stale: <red>Your selected alliance no longer exists. Select another with /lsu alliances select <alliance name>.</red>
lsu.alliances.detail.member_status.pendi: Pending Invite; shown as member to everyone but themselves
lsu.alliances.command.control_required_a: <red>You cannot add users to alliances you don't control! Create your own alliance if you wish to execute this command.</red>
lsu.alliances.command.control_required_r: <red>You cannot remove users from alliances you don't control!</red>
lsu.alliances.command.list_required: <red>No previous list selected this session and no list provided.</red>
